creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Laurent from comment #3)

Hi Laurent,

I can confirm that you are right, on Poudriere (15.0-CURRENT amd64) it installs fine with the AVX option enabled.

On the same box, in an unclean environment, it fails as in comment #1. I am building with portmaster.

Thanks for testing.
